mechanism: Construct signed attitude indices or multi-dimensional evaluations across conditions; perform mixed-effect linear regression with predictor variables (ideology, target characteristics, interaction terms) and evaluation measures as dependent variables; estimate coefficients and test interactions.

Estimate life-history strategy stereotypes from participant ratings via multi-level analysis; test orthogonal manipulations of ecology and race information; predict stereotype strength as function of individual environment cues and racial categories.

Measure memory qualities (clarity, vividness, detail) via subjective scales and objective recall; estimate memory degradation using longitudinal comparisons and multiple regression with behavior condition (cheat vs. no-cheat) and time delay as factors; mediate through psychological dissonance.

Assign participants to mindset condition (empathic or control); administer online intervention modules with writing prompts; measure teacher discipline responses via coding of open-ended text; compare outcome rates across conditions using mixed-effect regression and mediation tests.

Design two-stage economic game where first stage decision process (revealed or hidden) operationalizes calculation level; measure variation in cooperation choice and decision time; test interaction between observability and helping behavior via logistic or linear regression.

Assign allocators to predict or estimate receiver happiness under fair vs. unfair procedures; compare allocator predictions to receiver actual outcomes; estimate salience-driven perspective mismatch using within- and between-subject comparisons and regression on temporal framing.
